strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, and cloud systems
Leadership in open-source AI/ML-adjacent projects (e.g., GISCollective, MCP infrastructure)
Proven entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective founder) and startup-like initiative in larger orgs
concerns: No explicit AI/ML expertise or productization experience in the resume (AI-agent work is tangential)
Lacks advanced degrees (Master's/PhD in AI) and cloud/AI platform strategy focus
Minimal evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on AI technologies

key_factors.factor: Cloud/AI technology fluency and builder experience

response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum 15-year requirement and has relevant full-stack and infrastructure experience. However, there is no clear evidence of AI product development, cloud platform strategy, or customer advisory roles. AI-agent infrastructure contributions are promising but not sufficient for the 'recognized expertise in AI' requirement. No advanced degrees or startup leadership in AI/ML domains are listed.
